Class Employee

java.lang.Object
Employee
public class Employee extends Object
Represents a row element in the Employees table. Allows for updates to the database table Employees.

Contains the following elements per row:

  • Unique Id for employee
  • First name
  • Last name
  • Role in the job, Manager, Cashier, etc.
  • Hourly wage
  • Active status
